name: cachly-brain
description: AI Brain for VS Code — your AI finally remembers. Status bar lesson counter, ambient learning, CodeLens hints, team Brain sharing, Memory Crystal 💎, cost savings tracker, one-click trial setup.

commands.title: Cachly: Recall Lessons for This File
Cachly: Sign Out (reset stored API key)

cachly.refreshInterval.description: Status bar refresh interval in seconds

cachly.showCostSaved.description: Show estimated LLM cost saved in the status bar

cachly.ambientLearning.description: Detect repeated typing patterns and offer to save them as Brain lessons

cachly.clsLearning.description: Compiler Learning Stream: auto-save a Brain lesson when a compiler error disappears after an edit (CLS Layer 5)

enumDescriptions: Save immediately with no prompts (topic and lesson are auto-detected)
Show a single notification to confirm, edit or skip before saving
Show the full form with topic, description and outcome fields
cachly.lessonSaveMode.description: How to handle lesson saving. 'auto' = zero clicks, 'confirm' = one click (default), 'manual' = full form

cachly.codeLens.description: Show Brain lessons as CodeLens hints at the top of relevant files

cachly.trialExpiresAt.description: ISO timestamp when the current trial expires (managed by extension; do not edit manually)

cachly.authorName.description: Your name or GitHub handle for Team Brain attribution (e.g. 'alice' or 'alice@myteam'). Used by learn_from_attempts and VS Code lesson saving to credit lessons to you in team reports.

chatParticipants.name: cachly
chatParticipants.description: Recall, save and inspect your Brain's lessons. Try: recall <topic>, save <lesson>, status.

commands.name: recall
commands.description: Search your Brain for relevant lessons

commands.name: save
commands.description: Save the current discussion as a Brain lesson

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Cachly Brain
walkthroughs.description: Connect your Brain, save your first lesson, and recall it — so your AI finally remembers.

steps.title: Connect your Brain
steps.description:
One click to start a free trial or paste an existing API key. The status bar will turn green when your Brain is online.
[Connect Brain](command:cachly.setup)

Already have a key? [Open Settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%5B%22cachly%22%5D)

steps.title: Save your first lesson
steps.description:
Teach your Brain something. Select code or just run the command, and it remembers across sessions, restarts and machines.
[Save a Lesson](command:cachly.saveLesson)

steps.title: Recall what it learned
steps.description:
Open a file and let the Brain surface relevant lessons — or run Brain Doctor anytime to verify everything is healthy.
[Recall for This File](command:cachly.recallForFile)

[Run Brain Doctor](command:cachly.diagnose)
